title: jasminum kostermansii
intro: Jasminum kostermansii is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the Kostermans' jasmine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Jasminum kostermansii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
